element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core offensive mechanic paired with basic locomotion
Escalating environmental threats tied to plot

element_introduction_order.element: Amusement park themed stages with thematic variation
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Final world (Clock Tower, Western World, Future World)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Thematic stage diversity before final boss
Climactic encounter requiring all learned mechanics

typical_tension_triggers: Time-pressure elements (ceiling collapse during final escape)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear progression with stage-based tension peaks. Moderate difficulty with escalation toward end-game. Cooperative multiplayer extends relief cycles through shared resource management.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible for beginners; basic combat and platforming introduced without overwhelming complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate difficulty increase with environmental hazards and varied enemy types introduced through narrative progression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Challenging amusement park stages with thematic variety; giant robot boss and final escape sequence with ceiling collapse
notable_spikes: Warehouse stage with ghost hazards and locked-in scenario
Final boss gauntlet at amusement park control room
Ceiling collapse escape sequence during Fat Cat confrontation

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Linear stage progression with fixed ordering
notable_level_patterns.description: Unlike the first game, stages follow a mandatory linear sequence except at the amusement park world where first three stages (Clock Tower, Western World, Future World) can be completed in any order
Each major location ends with a boss encounter; pattern driven by narrative pursuit of Fat Cat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Warehouse stage ends with ghost confrontation; Amusement park stages escalate to giant robot boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Hazards tie directly to story beats: refrigerator entrapment, ghost release, amusement park attractions, structural collapse
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Warehouse (refrigerator hazard), Amusement Park (thematic attraction stages)

notable_level_patterns.description: Two-player mechanic (pick-up-and-throw) creates natural rhythm breaks and tactical decision points
